---
title: "Harmonize Data"
date: today
---

## Overview

Once raw microdata is available on datalibweb, it is harmonized to the **50by35 schema** (see [Schema & Variable Dictionary](05-schema.qmd)). Harmonization maps survey-specific variables, codes, and units onto the mandatory and optional variables defined by the schema, so that welfare and self-reliance indicators are comparable across surveys, countries, and years.

## Sample harmonization scripts

Example harmonization scripts covering 14 country/survey combinations are available in the `Stata/` folder of this repository. They are not intended to be used as-is, but illustrate the harmonization process and provide a starting point for writing survey-specific scripts:

| `code` | `year` | `survname` | Welfare type | Refugee definition | Assistance subtracted for `welfare_self` | Script |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| TCD | 2018 | EHCVM | Consumption | `pop_group` 1 (refugee east/Sudan), 2 (refugee south/CAR); host `<5km`/`5-15km` (3, 4) and Chadians (5) dropped | `income_aid` — HH-level annual aid income, netted out before deflation | [do-file](https://github.com/GPID-WB/50by35-data/blob/main/Stata/TCD_2018_EHCVM_V01_M_V01_A_FDP_WELF.do) |
| TCD | 2022 | EHCVM | Consumption | `pop_group` 1 (refugee east/Sudan), 2 (refugee south/CAR), 6 (refugee, other countries); host `<5km`/`5-15km` (3, 4) and Chadians (5) dropped | `income_aid` — HH-level annual aid income, netted out before deflation | [do-file](https://github.com/GPID-WB/50by35-data/blob/main/Stata/TCD_2022_EHCVM_V01_M_V01_A_FDP_WELF.do) |
| NER | 2018 | EHCVM | Consumption | `pop_group` 1 (displaced from Niger), 2 (Malian refugees), 3 (Nigerian refugees) | `income_aid` — HH-level annual aid income, netted out before deflation | [do-file](https://github.com/GPID-WB/50by35-data/blob/main/Stata/NER_2018_EHCVM_V01_M_V01_A_FDP_WELF.do) |
| COL | 2022 | GEIH | Income | `refugee==1` ("migrated from Venezuela"), excluding Colombia-born (`cbirth==170`, i.e. children born in Colombia to Venezuelan parents) | `inc_transf_inst` — monthly HH institutional/government transfers, divided by `npersug` before netting out | [do-file](https://github.com/GPID-WB/50by35-data/blob/main/Stata/COL_2022_GEIH_V01_M_V01_A_FDP_WELF.do) |
| COL | 2023 | GEIH | Income | `refugee==1` ("migrated from Venezuela"), excluding Colombia-born (`cbirth==170`, i.e. children born in Colombia to Venezuelan parents) | `inc_transf_inst` — monthly HH institutional/government transfers, divided by `npersug` before netting out | [do-file](https://github.com/GPID-WB/50by35-data/blob/main/Stata/COL_2023_GEIH_V01_M_V01_A_FDP_WELF.do) |
| UGA | 2018 | RHS | Consumption | `refugee_status==1` ("Refugee", source-labeled category vs. "Non-refugee" host) | None subtracted directly — source provides `cons_agg_less_aid` (consumption net of aid) already | [do-file](https://github.com/GPID-WB/50by35-data/blob/main/Stata/UGA_2018_RHS_V01_M_V01_A_FDP_WELF.do) |
| JOR | 2021, 2023 | VAF | Consumption | `Nationality` 1 (Syrian urban) or 2 (Syrian camp); non-Syrian refugees (`Nationality==3`) dropped — VAF has no Jordanian host sample | None subtracted directly — source provides `pce_without_assistance` already | [do-file](https://github.com/GPID-WB/50by35-data/blob/main/Stata/JOR_2021_VAF_V01_M_V01_A_FDP_WELF.do) |
| LBN | 2023 | VASYR | Consumption | Syrian household head (`head_nationality==192`, value-labeled "Syria"); Lebanese/other-nationality heads dropped | None subtracted directly — source provides `CAwosocialasst` (consumption net of social assistance) already | [do-file](https://github.com/GPID-WB/50by35-data/blob/main/Stata/LBN_2023_VASYR_V01_M_V01_A_FDP_WELF.do) |
| PSE | 2023 | PECS | Consumption | `refugee==1` — registered Palestine refugees per UNRWA criteria, resident in the West Bank or Gaza | `cons_hh_n` vs. `cons_hh_n_noaid` — nominal with/without-aid ratio applied to the deflated welfare measure | [do-file](https://github.com/GPID-WB/50by35-data/blob/main/Stata/PSE_2023_PECS_V01_M_V01_A_FDP_WELF.do) |
| ETH | 2022 | SESRE | Consumption | `sample_type` 2 ("Out of camp refugee") or 3 ("In-camp refugee"); "Host community" (1) dropped | None subtracted directly — source provides `total_exp_pre` (pre-assistance consumption) already | [do-file](https://github.com/GPID-WB/50by35-data/blob/main/Stata/ETH_2022_SESRE_V01_M_V01_A_FDP_WELF.do) |
| CRI | 2023 | ENAHO | Income | `lugnac==2` (born in Nicaragua); other birthplace categories (same/other canton, other Central American/world country) dropped | `timas_hh + ts_hh` — HH monthly assistance/subsidy transfers, netted out before the per-capita/PPP transformation | [do-file](https://github.com/GPID-WB/50by35-data/blob/main/Stata/CRI_2023_ENAHO_V01_M_V01_A_FDP_WELF.do) |
| CRI | 2024 | ENAHO | Income | `lugnac==2` (born in Nicaragua); other birthplace categories (same/other canton, other Central American/world country) dropped | `timas_hh + ts_hh` — HH monthly assistance/subsidy transfers, netted out before the per-capita/PPP transformation | [do-file](https://github.com/GPID-WB/50by35-data/blob/main/Stata/CRI_2024_ENAHO_V01_M_V01_A_FDP_WELF.do) |
| CMR | 2025 | FDS | Consumption | `pops==1` ("Réfugié/Demandeur d'asile" — refugee or asylum-seeker); "Hôte" (host, 2) dropped | None subtracted directly — source provides `nom_cons_minus_aid` already | [do-file](https://github.com/GPID-WB/50by35-data/blob/main/Stata/CMR_2025_FDS_V01_M_V01_A_FDP_WELF.do) |
| CHL | 2022 | CASEN | Income | `r1b_pais_esp_cod` (mother's country of residence) 513 Venezuela, 505 Colombia, or 413 Haiti — the source's proxy for forced-displacement origin, since CASEN has no direct refugee-status variable | `yaimcorh` — HH monthly assistance/subsidy income, netted out of total household income before the per-adult-equivalent transformation | [do-file](https://github.com/GPID-WB/50by35-data/blob/main/Stata/CHL_2022_CASEN_V01_M_V01_A_FDP_WELF.do) |

Common conventions across all scripts:

- **Sample**: refugees only — the 50by35 monitoring population. Each script's comment header documents the survey-specific classification used (population group codes, nationality, birth country, etc.).
- **`welfare`**: the survey's official welfare aggregate, converted to **annual per capita LCU**.
- **`welfare_self`**: welfare net of humanitarian/social assistance (per capita, same periodicity and deflation as `welfare`), floored at zero and capped at `welfare`. Where the source provides a net-of-aid aggregate directly (e.g. Uganda's `cons_agg_less_aid`), that is used; otherwise assistance is netted out of the underlying income/consumption components before the same per-capita/deflation/annualization transformation applied to `welfare`. Confirm the final definition with the 50by35 methodology team.
- **Sentinel codes** (e.g. `age == 9999`) are converted to system missing.

After harmonizing, check the file against the schema before upload:

::: {.panel-tabset}

## R

```r
library(haven)
source("R/validate_50by35.R")

df <- read_dta("data/processed/<SurveyID>_WELF.dta")
validate_50by35(df)
```

## Stata

```stata
use "data/processed/<SurveyID>_WELF.dta", clear
do "Stata/validate_50by35.do"
```

:::
